web__flight_aware__task_1.18.txt.action:
pyautogui.click(112, 45)
pyautogui.write("Pittsburgh")
pyautogui.press("enter")
pyautogui.click(125, 40)
pyautogui.write("JFK")
pyautogui.press("enter")

web__flight_aware__task_1.25.txt.instruction: Navigate to the site"s language options and select the second language listed using keyboard command
web__flight_aware__task_1.25.txt.action:
pyautogui.click(1118, 20)  # Click on the language dropdown menu
pyautogui.press('down')  # Press the down arrow to move to the second language option
pyautogui.press('enter')  # Press enter to select the second language

web__flight_aware__task_1.26.txt.instruction: Utilize keyboard inputs to select the second listed language option on the webpage.

web__flight_aware__task_1.19.txt.instruction: Select the second language option on the webpage using your mouse

web__flight_aware__task_1.14.txt.instruction: Search for a flight by inputting Pittsburgh as the Origin and JFK as the Destination.
web__flight_aware__task_1.14.txt.action:
pyautogui.click(10, 50)
pyautogui.write("Pittsburgh")
pyautogui.press("enter")
pyautogui.click(10, 50)
pyautogui.write("JFK")
pyautogui.press("enter")

web__flight_aware__task_1.15.txt.instruction: Use the mouse actions for switching between textboxes to find flights leaving from Pittsburgh to JFK
web__flight_aware__task_1.15.txt.action:
pyautogui.click(132, 716)
pyautogui.click(397, 716)
pyautogui.write("Pittsburgh")
pyautogui.press("enter")
pyautogui.click(441, 716)
pyautogui.write("JFK")
pyautogui.press("enter")
